title: Da Humans modpack
description: this is the client side modpack for Da Humans server that I made with my friends. the servers are whitelisted. but the mod included are optimisation and very vanilla and other servers can be added. (I did not create nor own any of the mods)
body:
# **Da Humans mod pack**

This modpack is made for the Da Humans Server. It has all the mods that are used on the Da Humans Server. These mods are already set up so you can get started easily. The main goal of this modpack is to make Minecraft run better make the interface easier to understand and make it more user friendly.

While many included mods are client-side quality-of-life and performance enhancements, the pack is not entirely client-side and is made to be used with the Da Humans Server. The pack avoids major gameplay changes, instead providing small visual improvements, clearer HUD elements, and lightweight building and utility tools.

## custom resource pack
it also includes the custom resource pack used on the server, with all the custom model that i made using blockbench ([https://www.blockbench.net/](https://www.blockbench.net/)). it has custom top hats, christmas hat and the master sword and hylian shield.
![me holding the master sword and hylian shield.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f7e55530b191c9196f4652f75eadf46add9034c.png)
![me wearing top hat 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc7963a313ec40e35200d5723d8a9900a5fddd4.png)
![me wearing top hat 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28c7d983037d9f81f19dbc117c978617c8671675.png)
![me wearing a christmas hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7efd969f05451836b4e00929972a9c7417ddd14.png)

The modpack includes two whitelisted servers for me and my friends but they can be deleted.

## **Server information**

The world spawn
![the world spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e56ca3c1964d86066728f72b9711d01a851c71.png)

The parts of the world that i loaded
![the loaded parts of the world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e45fea00cd3a0bf215309811415af073cc14306a_0.webp)

The list of (whitelisted) servers added
![included servers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7f36566881d0d0867e2029e369c968953bdbd3.png)


### **Copyright & Disclaimer**

I do not own or claim credit for any of the mods or resource packs included in this modpack. therefor I will not claim or withdraw any revenue generated by this modpack; any earnings will remain untouched in my account balance. This modpack exists purely to help my friends access the required mods for Da Humans Server quickly and easily, along with any future updates.

### Vanilla Tweaks

[https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

### Christmas hat model
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wearable-christmas-hats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wearable-christmas-hats)
